piu_project_locations_adm3.title: Ethiopia PIU Project Locations - ADM3
piu_project_locations_adm3.snippet: World Bank-supported Ethiopia PIU project locations joined to FCV-modified ADM3 woreda polygons.
piu_project_locations_adm3.description: Project-location polygons derived from the PIU survey export and matched to Woredas_FCVModified/Eth_Admin3_v2.shp. One feature represents one project in one ADM3 area. Rebuild the GeoJSON with scripts/build_piu_adm3_locations.py before publishing.
